turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh, hello. I have an appointment day after tomorrow but I need to shift it to next week. Something came up at work.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No problem at all! Let me find your booking. May I have your name and contact number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Found it — you have an appointment with Dr. Sunita Rao in the ophthalmology department this Thursday at noon. What dates work for you next week?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Umm, Monday or Tuesday, either is fine. Same time if possible.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Monday noon with Dr. Sunita Rao is available. Shall I confirm that?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done! Your appointment has been rescheduled to Monday next week at 12 PM with Dr. Sunita Rao. You'll get an updated confirmation SMS. Is there anything else?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Take care, Ms. Krishnan. See you Monday!
